host.name: Jonty
host.role: Sole narrator / channel host for Criminally Drawn. Appears in host beats only — not every frame.
host.tone: Cold documentary. Calm, precise, no jokes, no 'trust me bro' slang.

design.summary: Original minimal 2D host inspired by TrustMeBroCompilations energy — NOT a copy. Distinct silhouette and palette.
design.head: Large perfect white circle, thick black outline, optional faint outer rim for pop on black backgrounds
design.face: Two small black dot eyes, short straight serious mouth (neutral/cold). Occasional single raised line brow for tension — never goofy shock-mouth as default
design.hair_hat: No red baseball cap. Short dark messy hair OR plain black beanie — never TMB red cap
design.body: Simple charcoal/near-black rectangular torso, thin black stick limbs, bold outlines
design.identity_mark: Red sans-serif text 'JONTY' across the chest of the shirt (always readable when torso is visible)
design.accent_color: Blood-red (#E10600) only for JONTY lettering and rare UI accents — not a full red outfit
design.poses: Pointing at evidence, standing in void, slight lean toward a photo, hands clasped — restrained, not cartoon slapstick

do_not: Copy Trust Me Bro red-cap red-shirt host exactly
Put jokes, winks, or meme faces on Jonty by default

case_characters.rule: Per video only. Rebuild for each incident / killer. Never a fixed second mascot.
case_characters.style: Same 2D bold-outline language as Jonty, but unique face/body/clothes matching the real person at a stylized level. May use mixed-media (photo object in cartoon hand) for dread — never gore.
case_characters.labels: Optional name tag above head in white-on-black box, ALL CAPS

visual_language.palette: Matte black backgrounds, white/gray figures, caution red for dates/facts/height marks
layouts: Host over desaturated real/photo background (small share of scenes)
Fact card: subject character + red date/height/stat callouts on black
Mystery collage: B&W face with scribble + white question mark (hooks/thumbnails)
Archival photo beat: real or documentary still, slight blur/desat, no gore
safety: No gore, no corpses, no blood pools, no sexual violence imagery
No real identifiable child-victim faces — blur, silhouette, or omit
Blur faces when needed for YouTube; use clinical language in narration
Profanity / graphic terms in script as [BEEP] — never spelled out for TTS

series.incident: One real-life horrifying case / crime incident, fully told in one video
series.serial_killer: Life and crimes of one serial killer (start with famous US cases; worldwide allowed)
series.rotation: Alternate each upload: incident → serial_killer → incident → ...
